records.ety: [L., fr. servire to serve: cf. F. serviteur.]

defs: One who serves; a servant; an attendant; one who acts under another; a follower or adherent.
quotes: Your trusty and most valiant servitor.

defs: An undergraduate, partly supported by the college funds, whose duty it formerly was to wait at table. A servitor corresponded to a sizar in Cambridge and Dublin universities.
